title: Austerity on gold, fossil fuel key to manage inflation: Ex-Secy
description: Ex-Secretary KP Krishnan advocates for austerity in gold and fossil fuel to manage demand and curb inflation amid global supply shocks. He says such measures are vital to preserve India's strong inflation management record.

title: An ancient city was left in ruins—but this remarkable statue survived
description: When two British explorers excavated the remnants of the ancient Greek city of Cyrene in 1861, many tombs had already been looted. But the Sanctuary of Apollo still held their greatest find yet.
